name: NXGEN Golf Lakewood Ranch
about: NXGEN Golf operates two indoor golf studios, Bee Ridge in Sarasota and Lakewood Ranch in Bradenton, Florida. The venue focuses on providing a premium golf training experience using state-of-the-art Trackman technology for lessons, fittings, and simulator play. They offer various lesson packages, memberships, and club fitting services, catering to golfers looking for professional instruction and practice opportunities in an indoor environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman technology for precise shot tracking and analysis
Professional PGA-certified coaching for all skill levels
Custom club fitting services for optimized equipment performance

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor technology for all bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for lessons and simulator play. The venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. The venue does not have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes, as it depends on the simulator software used and player speed.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior programs and appears to accommodate younger golfers with age-appropriate instruction and activities.
